title: Nomads enjoy Goose Valley
bodyText:
REGIONAL NEWS - With 58 players, the Southern Cape Nomads held their July game on Sunday 14 July at the spectacular Goose Valley golf and country estate.

The weather was sunny with a slight breeze, adding a touch of challenge to the game for some.

Divisional winners:

A - Danie Langelaar 33 points

B - Flats Huisamen 32 points

C - Anton Izaakse 34 points

Best playing pair: Dave Meyer and Tokkie du Toit

Matchbox (longest day): Greg Savage

The Nomads thank Stanmar Motors George for their monthly sponsorship of this day, as well as their national sponsors SAB, Taylormade, Diago, Hollywoodbets and Stella Artois.

For more information on Southern Cape Nomads go to www.nomads.org or visit their Facebook page, Southern Cape Nomads.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
